title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 50.
content:
There was an old Man of th' Abruzzi,
    So blind that he couldn't his foot see;
    When they said, "That's your toe,"
    He replied, "Is it so?"
    That doubtful old Man of th' Abruzzi.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 50." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
